    "Insulation resistance test skipped after high-voltage system repair",
    "Failure to verify isolation barrier integrity before re-energization"

  "actions": [
    "Lock out and tag out the high-voltage system immediately",
    "Perform the required insulation resistance (megohmmeter) test per OEM specifications",
    "Document test results to verify isolation integrity before closing out the service call"

  "rationale": "Skipping the insulation resistance test after a high-voltage repair violates OEM safety procedures and NFPA 70E-adjacent safety standards. It introduces a critical risk of shock, electrocution, or thermal event upon re-energization if the isolation barrier has been compromised during the repair.",

  ]
